response.justification: While the candidate significantly exceeds the experience requirement (20 years) and demonstrates director-level technical capability with cloud infrastructure expertise, the role specifically requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products and platforms. The candidate's AI engagement appears limited to recent infrastructure work (MCP/agentic frameworks at re:cinq since April 2025) rather than AI strategy or building AI-powered products. Without an advanced degree in AI and with a career history primarily in web/mobile development and infrastructure, they lack the specialized AI expertise and track record this Principal AI Strategy role requires, though they could potentially develop into it.
strengths: Significantly exceeds experience requirement with 20 years across web, mobile, infrastructure, and embedded systems engineering
Demonstrates entrepreneurial and leadership capability as GISCollective founder and Staff Engineer with mentoring record (code dojos, workshops, education initiatives)
Strong cloud and infrastructure expertise with hands-on experience in AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker, and modern DevOps practices
concerns: AI experience appears limited to recent role (April 2025+) focused on infrastructure/tooling (MCP, agentic frameworks) rather than AI product strategy or building AI-powered platforms
No advanced degree in AI field and lacks demonstrated recognized expertise with published AI products, research, or significant AI platform contributions
Career trajectory focused primarily on full-stack web/mobile development rather than AI strategy, making the transition to Principal AI Strategy Engineer a substantial and unproven pivot

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and demonstrated AI products/platforms
General engineering seniority and cloud infrastructure skills
Recent AI infrastructure engagement and ability to learn quickly
